text: Being here, surrounded by glass, technology, and the marks of human innovation, I feel a sense of curiosity and contemplation. The conversation about dried shells and sea bass is strangely distant from my current environment, almost surreal. Here, in this space dedicated to research and development, metaphors about shells and fish take on new meaning—perhaps about vulnerability, growth, and the shifting boundaries of harm and safety. I feel inspired to reflect further, both on the world outside and the one we build within these walls.
